## DecoratorFor type

Creates a decorator that will only work for properties of the type passed. The decorator will only work if the property is public.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type DecoratorFor<Type> = <Key extends string, Target extends Record<Key, Type>>(target: Target, key: Key) => void;
```
